findings.detail: 6 nodes across 2 parallel subgraphs (Song A + Song B, 3 nodes each). Linear LR chains inside each subgraph cleanly encode position-to-property ordering. Subgraph titles carry the song vector literals; diagram title states the 'same slot order' rule. Subtitles at 12px are legible at 1400px viewer width. No overlaps, truncation, or layout failures.
